title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Are you a careful shopper, or do you tend to buy things on impulse?
How do you feel about advertising? Does it influence your choices?
Do you try to buy locally made or environmentally friendly products?
What's the most useful thing you've bought recently?
Do you think people today own too many things?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think consumerism is a major problem in today's society?
Is it realistic to expect people to buy less and reuse more?
Do you think companies have a moral responsibility to make products that last?
